violations.text: Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The 3-door reach in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The condensate from the deli display case refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other non sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The condensate from the deli display case refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2024
